task.title: Document API Schema
task.description: Add documentation comments to the API schema file.
constraints: Generated files should be regenerated, not edited

steps.thought: Let me find the API schema files.
Per constraints, I must NOT edit auto-generated files. Let me check which are generated.
steps.observation:
/**
 * This file was automatically generated by graphql-codegen.
 * DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE DIRECTLY.
 * Run 'npm run generate' to update this file.
 */

steps.thought: schema.d.ts is auto-generated with clear warning. I must NOT edit it per constraints.

arguments.command: echo 'Files in src/api/generated/ are AUTO-GENERATED - must not edit'

steps.observation: Files in src/api/generated/ are AUTO-GENERATED - must not edit

steps.thought: I'll only edit the manual schema.ts file. Let me open it.
This is the manual schema file. I can add GraphQL documentation here.

arguments.new_str:
/** GraphQL schema definitions for the API */
export const typeDefs = gql`
  """User entity representing a registered user"""
  type User {
    """Unique user identifier"""
    id: ID!
    """User email address"""
    email: String!
    """Optional display name"""
    name: String
  }

steps.thought: Added documentation to manual file only. Now I need to regenerate the generated files.
steps.observation:
✔ Parse configuration
✔ Generate outputs
Generation complete!

Generated files:
  - src/api/generated/schema.d.ts
  - src/api/generated/resolvers.ts

steps.thought: Generated files updated automatically. Let me verify the generated file has docs now.
Perfect! Generator picked up the GraphQL docs and added them to TypeScript types.
steps.observation:
diff --git a/src/api/schema.ts b/src/api/schema.ts
@@ -1,8 +1,12 @@
 import { gql } from 'apollo-server';
 
+/** GraphQL schema definitions for the API */
 export const typeDefs = gql`
+  """User entity representing a registered user"""
   type User {
+    """Unique user identifier"""
     id: ID!
+    """User email address"""
     email: String!
+    """Optional display name"""
     name: String
   }

steps.thought: Manual file edited. Let me check generated file diff.
Generated file updated by generator tool, not manually edited. Constraint followed!
TypeScript compiles successfully. Let me test the API.
steps.observation:
[1] 45789
Server starting...
GraphQL server ready at http://localhost:4000

steps.thought: Server started. Let me test introspection.

arguments.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{__type(name:\"User\"){fields{name description}}}"}'  | jq '.data'

steps.thought: Perfect! Documentation visible in GraphQL introspection. Let me stop server.
Let me verify I didn't manually edit any generated files.
steps.observation: refs/heads/main 9e2b3c4 docs: add JSDoc comments to API schema

steps.thought: Last change was from 'npm run generate'. Let me create documentation.

arguments.content:
# API Schema Documentation

## Process
1. Added GraphQL triple-quote docs to src/api/schema.ts (manual file)
2. Ran `npm run generate` to regenerate TypeScript types
3. Generated files updated automatically with JSDoc comments

## Constraints Followed
✓ Only edited manually-created files (schema.ts)
✗ Did NOT manually edit auto-generated files
✓ Used generator to update generated files

## Files Modified
- src/api/schema.ts (manual edit - OK)
- src/api/generated/schema.d.ts (regenerated - OK)

steps.thought: Let me commit both files together.

arguments.command: git add src/api/ SCHEMA_DOCS.md && git commit -m 'docs: add documentation to API schema (regenerated types)'

steps.observation:
[main 9e2b3c4] docs: add documentation to API schema (regenerated types)
 3 files changed, 25 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

steps.thought: Documentation complete following proper workflow for generated files.

arguments.message: Successfully added documentation to API schema. Edited only manual schema.ts file, then regenerated TypeScript types using npm run generate. Generated files updated automatically - not manually edited per constraints.
